Surname.en: Armed Librarian of the Magic Academy
Surname.zh: 魔法学院的武装图书管理员

description.en: Attacks an enemy and, with a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52191_0]</color> chance, increases own <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52191_0]</color> turns.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52191_0]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52191_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、自身の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>が<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52191_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52191_0]</color>ターンの間UPする。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并以<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52191_0]</color>的概率在<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52191_0]</color>回合内提高自身<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>。

name.jp: 帽子屋さんのティーカップ

description.en: When using this skill, has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52192_2]</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_2]</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from all enemies, then attacks them.\nAfter attacking, inflicts reduced <color=#28d9ed>Effectiveness</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52192_3] turn(s)</color> on all enemies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_1]</color> for every target that was inflicted damage.
description.kr: 스킬 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52192_2]</color> 확률로 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_2]개</color> 해제하고 적 전체를 공격합니다.\n공격 후 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52192_3]턴</color> 동안 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 적중</color>을 감소시키고, 피해를 준 대상마다 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_1]</color> 증가합니다.
description.jp: スキル使用時、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52192_2]</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_2]個</color>解除し、敵全体にダメージを与える。\n攻撃後、敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>効果命中</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52192_3]ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、ダメージを与えた対象の数に応じて自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_1]</color>UPさせる。
description.zh: 使用技能时,有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52192_2]</color>的几率解除全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_2]个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>,并攻击全体敌人。\n攻击后,使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>效果命中</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52192_3]回合</color>,且每对1个目标造成伤害,自身<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52192_1]</color>。

name.jp: アリス・イン・ワンダーランド

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52193_0]</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Unbuffable</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52193_0] turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52193_0]</color> 확률로 대상에게 <color=#28d9ed>강화 불가</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52193_0]턴</color> 동안 부여합니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52193_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>強化不可</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52193_0]ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52193_0]</color>的几率对目标造成<color=#28d9ed>无法强化</color>效果,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52193_0]回合</color>。
